movies.title: La Casa de Papel
movies.description: A criminal mastermind leads an audacious heist on the Royal Mint of Spain.
hints: Cover your face with both hands like a mask
Tiptoe around sneakily looking left and right
Hold up your hands like a robber surrendering
Rub your fingers together to mean money

movies.title: Wall Street
movies.description: Greed, ambition and insider trading in the cutthroat world of 1980s high finance.
hints: Hold a phone to your ear and shout
Point one thumb up, then one thumb down
Straighten an invisible tie and stand proud
Rub your fingers together to mean money

movies.title: L.A. Confidential
movies.description: Corruption and murder simmer beneath the glamour of 1950s Los Angeles.
hints: Tip an imaginary hat down over your eyes
Make a finger gun and point it
Hold up a flat hand like showing a police badge
Drag a finger across your throat

movies.title: City of God
movies.description: Two boys take divergent paths amid escalating gang violence in Rio's favelas.
hints: Hold up a camera and click the button
Point one way, then point the other way
Kick an invisible soccer ball
Point both hands up to the sky (god)

movies.title: Catch Me If You Can
movies.description: A charming young con artist forges his way across the globe, chased by the FBI.
hints: Stretch your arms out like airplane wings
Run in place looking back over your shoulder
Wave 'come here' with one finger
Pretend to write a signature in the air

movies.title: Ocean's Eleven
movies.description: Eleven con men plot to rob three Las Vegas casinos in a single night.
hints: Hold up ten fingers, then one more
Shake and toss invisible dice
Deal out playing cards one by one
Press your ear to an invisible safe and twist the dial

movies.title: The Italian Job
movies.description: A daring gold heist and a Mini Cooper getaway through the streets of Italy.
hints: Grip a steering wheel and swerve side to side
Pinch your fingers together and shake your hand (Italian gesture)
Lift something heavy and shiny (gold bars)
Point to your wrist like checking the time, then rush

movies.title: The Untouchables
movies.description: Lawmen wage war on Al Capone's bootlegging empire in Prohibition-era Chicago.
hints: Tap a flat hand on your chest like a badge
Cross your arms and shake your head 'no'
Hold an invisible big gun and shake it
Wag your finger 'you can't touch me'

movies.title: The Irishman
movies.description: An aging hitman reflects on decades of mob loyalty, violence and betrayal.
hints: Walk slowly and hunched like an old man
Make a finger gun and point it down low
Put a finger to your lips for 'keep it secret'
Shake hands then turn your back (betrayal)

movies.title: Lupin
movies.description: A gentleman thief plots elaborate, elegant heists to avenge his father.
hints: Take a polite bow with one hand on your stomach
Tiptoe and grab something quickly, then hide it
Cover and uncover your face (disguise)
Tip an imaginary hat to someone

movies.title: Amélie
movies.description: A whimsical Parisian waitress quietly orchestrates small moments of joy for others.
hints: Smile shyly and tilt your head
Tap an invisible spoon to crack a dessert top
Carry a tray and serve someone
Hold a hand over your heart and grin

movies.title: Barbie
movies.description: A doll's journey into the real world becomes a colorful celebration of identity.
hints: Stand stiff like a doll with a frozen smile
Walk on your tiptoes (permanent high heels)
Make a big heart shape with your arms
Wave like a beauty queen

movies.title: Forrest Gump
movies.description: An earnest man stumbles through history with kindness, luck and a pure heart.
hints: Sit down and offer someone a box of chocolates
Run in place with a big innocent smile
Wave slowly and tip your cap
Swing a paddle fast for ping-pong

movies.title: Frozen
movies.description: A fearless princess braves an eternal winter, powered by sisterly love.
hints: Shoot 'ice' from your hands and freeze
Hug yourself and shiver from the cold
Stack three invisible snowballs into a snowman
Throw your arms out wide and sing

movies.title: La La Land
movies.description: Two dreamers chase love and ambition through a song-filled Los Angeles.
hints: Tap your feet and twirl around
Play an invisible piano
Look up dreamily and point to the stars
Spread your arms and pretend to sing

movies.title: Mary Poppins
movies.description: A magical nanny brings wonder, song and warmth to a London family.
hints: Hold an umbrella over your head and float down
Pull lots of things out of a small bag
Snap your fingers to clean up by magic
Stand prim and proper with a tidy curtsy

movies.title: Paddington
movies.description: A polite little bear spreads kindness across London, one marmalade sandwich at a time.
hints: Waddle around like a small bear
Spread jam on bread and put it under your hat
Tip a small hat and give a hard stare
Wave a polite hello to everyone

movies.title: The Sound of Music
movies.description: A spirited governess fills a family's home with music and hope.
hints: Spin in circles with your arms stretched out
Wave your hand like conducting children singing
Strum an invisible guitar and sing
Count 'do-re-mi' going up a scale with your hand

movies.title: Teletubbies
movies.description: Four cheerful creatures play and giggle under a sunny, friendly sky.
hints: Hold up four fingers and giggle
Make an antenna shape on top of your head
Pat your belly like a TV screen
Wave both arms and say 'eh-oh!'

movies.title: Willy Wonka
movies.description: A golden ticket opens the doors to a magical world of pure imagination.
hints: Tip a top hat and twirl an invisible cane
Hold up a shiny ticket and gasp with joy
Unwrap a chocolate bar and take a big bite
Sweep your arm wide to show off a room
